description: ActiveProbe Sensor Performance Testing - Per-process and system-wide metrics

panels.title: Sensor Process CPU Usage
panels.description: CPU usage (% Processor Time) per sensor process

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_process")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Percent_Processor_Time")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.scenario =~ /${scenario:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

panels.title: Sensor Process Memory (Working Set)
panels.description: Physical memory (Working Set) per sensor process in MB

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_process")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Working_Set")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.scenario =~ /${scenario:regex}/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 1048576.0 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

panels.title: Sensor Process Private Bytes
panels.description: Committed virtual memory (Private Bytes) per process in MB. Watch for growth trends in soak tests.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_process")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Private_Bytes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.scenario =~ /${scenario:regex}/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 1048576.0 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

panels.title: Sensor Process Handle Count
panels.description: Open handles per sensor process. Monitor for leaks during soak tests.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_process")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Handle_Count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.scenario =~ /${scenario:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_process")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Thread_Count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.scenario =~ /${scenario:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

panels.title: Sensor Process Disk I/O
panels.description: Disk read/write bytes per second per sensor process.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor_process")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "IO_Read_Bytes_persec" or r._field == "IO_Write_Bytes_persec")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.scenario =~ /${scenario:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

panels.title: System CPU Usage (Total)
panels.description: System-wide CPU usage. KPI thresholds: <2% idle (green), <15% under load (yellow), >15% sustained (red).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "win_cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Percent_Processor_Time")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

panels.title: System Available Memory
panels.description: Available physical memory (MBytes). Drop indicates memory pressure.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "win_mem")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Available_MBytes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "win_disk")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Disk_Reads_persec" or r._field == "Disk_Writes_persec")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "win_net")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Bytes_Received_persec" or r._field == "Bytes_Sent_persec")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

panels.title: Kernel Pool Memory (Paged + Non-Paged)
panels.description: Kernel pool memory usage. Important for detecting driver memory leaks.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "win_mem")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Pool_Paged_Bytes" or r._field == "Pool_Nonpaged_Bytes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 1048576.0 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

panels.title: Page Faults / sec
panels.description: Hard page faults per second. High values indicate memory thrashing.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "win_mem")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "Pages_persec")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

panels.title: Sensor Service Status
panels.description: Current status of each sensor Windows service. Green=Running, Red=Stopped.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telegraf")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "win_services")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "last")

title: ActiveProbe Sensor Performance

__inputs.name: DS_INFLUXDB
__inputs.label: InfluxDB-Perf
__inputs.description: InfluxDB data source for performance testing
